hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: rm -rf / is dangerous' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: force push requires explicit approval' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: hard reset requires explicit approval' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: chmod 777 is insecure' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED by StoryForge: piping to bash is dangerous' >&2; exit 2

if [ -f .kanban/board.md ]; then STORIES=$(ls .kanban/stories/STORY-*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); IN_PROGRESS=$(grep -l 'Status.*In Progress' .kanban/stories/STORY-*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); echo "StoryForge: Project detected. $STORIES stories total, $IN_PROGRESS in progress. Check .kanban/board.md before starting."; fi
if [ -f .kanban/board.md ]; then echo 'StoryForge: Session resumed. Verify .kanban/board.md for current work status before continuing.'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); case "$FILE" in *.kanban/stories/*) echo 'StoryForge: Story file modified. Remember to update .kanban/board.md if the status changed.' ;; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); STOP_ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"stop_hook_active":\s*true' || true); if [ -n "$STOP_ACTIVE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f .kanban/board.md ]; then echo 'StoryForge reminder: If you made changes, consider updating .kanban/ artifacts (story status, board, changelog).'; IN_PROGRESS=$(grep -l 'Status.*In Progress' .kanban/stories/STORY-*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo 0); if [ "$IN_PROGRESS" = '0' ] && [ -f .kanban/sprint.md ]; then echo 'StoryForge: No stories in progress. If the sprint is complete, run /security-audit before closing.'; fi; fi; exit 0
echo 'StoryForge: Permission prompt - Claude needs your input.'
